cross_scene_arcs.title: Meeting and Parting with Hikers
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Aron meets Kristi and Megan at the trailhead, offers climbing guidance, and later parts ways at a fork to continue alone towards the Big Drop Rappel.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Aron encounters two hikers and establishes friendly relations.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Aron continues alone on his path after inviting them to a party.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Trapped by the Boulder
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Aron's hand is crushed and pinned by a falling boulder, leading him to realize the injury is severe and shout for help.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Aron is canyoneering alone in the slot canyon.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Aron is trapped with a severe hand injury, actively seeking rescue.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: How to free his trapped hand and survive the injuries.

cross_scene_arcs.title: The Path to Self-Rescue
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Aron considers self-amputation after knife failure, retrieves the knife with a modified stick, breaks his arm bones, and cuts through to free himself.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Aron acknowledges self-amputation as a necessary measure.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Aron frees himself from the boulder but is in shock and disoriented.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Finding medical help or reaching safety after freeing himself.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Reflection and Evacuation
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: After 70 hours trapped, Aron records an emotional video message for his parents, and later is evacuated by helicopter for medical care.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Aron is stranded in the canyon with minimal water, reflecting on his life.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Aron is airborne in a helicopter, leaving the rescue site.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Megan's Evolving Concern for Aron
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Megan's interactions with Aron shift from playful teasing to showing immediate concern for his safety and expressing worry about his night climbing plans.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Playful and familiar teasing towards Aron during the cave climb.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Concerned for Aron's safety and committed to attending his party.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Whether Aron will safely complete his night climb and if the party will occur as planned.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Megan's Activity Involvement and Safety Awareness
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Megan initiates re-filming a pool scene, admits confusion about technical climbing instructions, and later questions safety practices during night climbing.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Engaged in collaborative filming with Kristi in the pool.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Aware of safety risks and expressing concern for Aron's climbing decisions.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Her own understanding of climbing safety and how to navigate descents safely.
